rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible variables or features
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Equation declarations use `eq name : type = expression;` pattern
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in type contracts
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
